name: claude-model-proxy
description: Runs a local proxy that routes Claude gateway model names to DeepSeek, Moonshot/Kimi, GLM, Xiaomi MiMo, OpenAI, Gemini, and Anthropic upstreams.
long_description: Starts a local HTTP proxy for Claude Desktop gateway. Requests are routed by model name: claude-deepseek-v4-flash maps to deepseek-v4-flash on DeepSeek, claude-deepseek-v4-pro maps to deepseek-v4-pro on DeepSeek, claude-kimi-k2.6 maps to kimi-k2.6 on Moonshot/Kimi, claude-glm-* aliases use actual Z.AI GLM model names, claude-mimo-* aliases use actual Xiaomi MiMo model names, claude-gpt-* aliases use OpenAI Chat Completions, claude-gemini-* aliases use Gemini's OpenAI-compatible API, and original Claude model names use Anthropic Messages. The installer focuses on gateway, DeepSeek, and Moonshot/Kimi settings; optional providers and mapping overrides can be supplied as advanced JSON.

tools.name: model_proxy_status
tools.description: Shows whether the local model-name proxy is running and how models are routed.

base_url.title: Gateway Base URL
base_url.description: The reachable URL configured in Claude Desktop gateway. Use the local loopback URL unless you separately configure DNS and TLS for a custom domain.

port.title: Local Proxy Port
port.description: Local port used by the extension's HTTP proxy.

deepseek_api_key.title: DeepSeek API Key
deepseek_api_key.description: DEEPSEEK_API_KEY. Sent only to DeepSeek as Authorization: Bearer ...

moonshot_api_key.title: Moonshot API Key
moonshot_api_key.description: MOONSHOT_API_KEY. Sent only to Moonshot/Kimi as Authorization: Bearer ...

advanced_env.title: Optional Advanced Settings JSON
advanced_env.description: Optional JSON object for less common provider keys and overrides, for example {"GLM_API_KEY":"...","XIAOMI_API_KEY":"...","ANTHROPIC_API_KEY":"sk-ant-...","OPENAI_API_KEY":"sk-...","GEMINI_API_KEY":"..."}.
